title: phlox kelseyi var. costata
intro: Phlox kelseyi var. costata, also known as the Kelsey's Phlox or Costate Kelsey's Phlox, is a variant of the Kelsey's Phlox plant (Phlox kelseyi) that is native to the mountainous regions of western North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its phenolic compounds and terpenoids. Consuming the plant or using its extracts may provide health benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and antimicrobial activity. Phlox kelseyi var. costata can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
